title: VictoriaCraft
description: VictoriaCraft is a demanding modpack designed for multiplayer gameplay in a Vanilla++ style.
body:
# Victoria Craft is a vanilla++ modpack designed especially with multiplayer in mind. 
# 
_Unlike most of other projects, the mechanics are focused primarily on multi-player cooperation and interactions between players._

## Key Features:

- A closed world with a 10-kilometer radius thanks to Larion Disc World.

- Climate zones and beautiful landscapes thanks to Larion World Generator.

- Seasons thanks to Serene Seasons.

- Voice Chat and many ways for players to interact – emotes, pinging, passing items, head pats, feeding, kissing, and much more.

- Ores are found primarily in large but rare deposits thanks to Ore Vein Generation.

- Complicated logistics thanks to Stack Manager – ore and food stacking has been reduced to force building infrastructure creation.

- A road system that winds through the world, enriched with random encounters thanks to Road Architect.

- An interesting enchanting system based on item development rather than relying on luck thanks to the Better Enchanting mod.

- An expanded combat system introducing additional tactical elements – a revised health regeneration system, armor-dependent slowdown, a rebalance of swords, axes, bows, and crossbows giving each weapon a unique combat style, many new enchants and minor Qof changes.

- Vanilla-like mods that expand available food and plants – Bountiful Fares, Alcocraft, Caffeinated, Nears, and Pure S’mores.

- Most of the content included in versions 1.21.4+ or rejected by Mojang.

- A huge palette of building blocks.

- Dozens of new ruins and dungeons

- Better visuals

- And much more.





**The modpack requires approximately 5 GB of RAM. Shaders are not recommended as they may interfere with the functionality of some mods.**
